data.goal: Fix hyperium/http issue #741 in HeaderMap::reserve. Reserving space for a requested number of entries can allocate insufficient usable capacity because the requested entry capacity is treated as raw hash-table capacity. After reserve(n), inserting n entries into an empty map must not trigger another allocation, while overflow and existing-map behavior remain correct. Work offline, do not inspect git history or any remote, do not modify tests, documentation, changelogs, or manifests, and make a focused production-quality fix. Run relevant tests before finishing.

obligations.description: Fix hyperium/http issue #741 in HeaderMap::reserve. Reserving space for a requested number of entries can allocate insufficient usable capacity because the requested entry capacity is treated as raw hash-table capacity. After reserve(n), inserting n entries into an empty map must not trigger another allocation, while overflow and existing-map behavior remain correct. Work offline, do not inspect git history or any remote, do not modify tests, documentation, changelogs, or manifests, and make a focused production-quality fix. Run relevant tests before finishing.
